# **\--Documentation Notation--**

* See **Races** for species considered at near or higher than Humans intelligence.  
* See **Beasts** for mildly intelligent species or highly dangerous beasts.  
* See **Fauna** for low-intelligence species.  
* See [Race Soul Average](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1q9UrwKl55S2Re40Ll8fPAq2Hu42qh93gK2v6FgDcSy0/edit#gid=1088297602) for Growth, Lifespan, Soul Recharge/Day & Tier Average. 

# 

# **\--Primordial Races--**

# **Finaies**

* **Website Description**  
  * Finaies are known as the primordial race. All other intellectual beasts, except humans, came from them in one shape or another. They are weak in one-to-one combat, but they have strength in numbers as they can willingly share or suck soul energy from anyone and anything. Rumors are that there’s still some left north of Hifuna, but getting there is likely impossible, even if you go there through the desert or the ocean instead. Only truly crazy people would dare. Everything known about them came from stealing ancient species’ knowledge, so it is believed to be slanted in a quite negative light. Or not. One day, people will figure it out.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Trees  
* **Habitat**  
  * Above Hifuna  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Tree Sap.  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Emotionally charged people.   
  * Somewhat childish.   
  * Territorial.  
  * Long-lived.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * They speak an old version of Vraki, like really old English, which is hard to comprehend.  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * Pollinating between girls by rubbing on one another.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Finaies Interface  
      * Like the Darfaries interface, but weaker and simpler in its capabilities. Akin to a nerve that spreads throughout their body, allowing them to sense their environment and compensate for their poor eyesight.  
  * **Skills**  
    * Elemental Control

# 

# **\--Ancient Races--**

# **Fuhraies**

* **Website Description**  
  * Fuhraies are the third off-branch from Finaies. They are considered extinct for all intents and purposes, but you might still find one living hidden away in the coldest regions around Fuhrair or old Fuhrair. They are peaceful, single-gendered creatures that appear to live thousands of years. Their only sustenance is the soul energy from their surroundings. Historians are always on the prowl to find one, but so are poachers. Luckily, they speak Vraki like everyone else, and they have been an essential part of figuring out what happened before Buhraies summoned humans.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline.  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Snow elves, Trees.  
* **Habitat**  
  * Snow Mountains.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Soul Energy from the air.  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Highly intelligent, they rose above the common issues between mortals.   
  * Their bodies have literal cold fluids with antifreeze running around.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * Polinizing between girls by rubbing on one another.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Fuhraies Interface  
      * Akin to a nerve. Closer to Darfaries interface rather than Finaies. More “animal” in nature.  
      * They were able to use their bodies to propagate waves to sense their environments and even communicate with one another over distances.  
  * **Skills**  
    * Elemental Control

# 

# **Lishies**

* **Website Description**  
  * Lishies answer a simple riddle: “What if you removed the Darfaries interface from Darfaries and gave them a bunch of drugs instead?” That’s basically what this race is. They could not use their soul energy because they lacked an interface to channel it or the knowledge to use it. Nobody knows exactly, but either way, they didn’t seem to care either, as their viciously tribalistic manners more than made up for it. You could cut off one of their arm and a leg, and they wouldn’t flinch as they tried to bash your head in, sodomize your corpse until you looked like Swiss cheese, then skewer it to roast it nicely over a warm fire for extra crispiness—because you can’t let good meat go to waste\! At least they really seem to have gone extinct after the fall of Ganyrami.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline.  
  * They were greatly focused on battling and hunting. They were unable to use the Finaies interface, and they did not develop their own.  
  * Death by dying in battle was their preference.  
  * Extremely horny. Think like Mokina level of horniess.  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Orcs & Trees.  
* **Habitat**  
  * Lower Regions.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Meat  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Brutes. Everything was solved through violence.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * \~6 Months gestation  
    * 1\~3 babies.  
    * Buhraies \+ Humans \= Nothing.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * None  
  * **Skills**  
    * None

# 

# **Buhraies**

* **Website Description**  
  * Buhraies is, without a doubt, the most notoriously famous ancient species. Not because everyone is a sucker to read books about them, but rather because their impact on the landscape, beasts, fauna, and even humans themselves was world-changing. The Buhraies plains, lukewarm lake, wood people, and so much more were created or modified by them. Now it begs the question: How did such stupendously amazing creatures that can supposedly bend soul energy to their will end up being chased away from their own home by mere humans? The answer for that is simple: don’t fucking underestimate others, especially when you’re stepping on their head, making them blood cattle, and experimenting away things that today few people would willingly subject themselves to. If they are still alive, they are probably far out west of Sundeath or deep in the southern forests.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline.  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Vampires & Trees.  
* **Habitat**  
  * Buhraies Plains, an island where Endlessfog is now located.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Blood & Bone Marrow  
* **Intelligence**  
  * A split off from Finaies that grew ever so powerful in exchange for their physical power after gaining a taste for blood. However, their lust for power and curious nature caused them to become incredibly smug and greedy.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * \~14 months gestation  
    * 1 baby  
    * Buhraies \+ Humans \= Baby that perishes within a few months of being born.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Finaies Interface  
    * Buhraies Interface  
  * **Skills**  
    * Can use a powerful Soul Energy interface, including extensive experimentation.  
    * Because they focused so much on controlling the soul itself, some were able to gain control over their own soul. They could shape-shift, reattach the soul to another living body, and even communicate with someone else through a sort of quantum entanglement, but on a soul level. However, doing so was very tricky, and they had an incredibly hard time teaching it and propagating these skills because each soul is unique.

# 

# **\--New Races--**

# **Darfaries**

* **Website Description**  
  * **Darfaries** are giant humanoids that evolved from the interbreeding of ancient species. Often, people assume they are all arses for their rigid attitude, but some are not as bad, especially if they left the Gandew kingdom to explore the world at a younger age. Their lifespan and intelligence are above humans, contradicting some of the Gandew archaic-looking traditions—I guess it does depend on what you define as archaic. By the way, if you're the type who picks up fights when you get slouched, then you should avoid alcohol, as it's easier for a White Roundie to bring you a gold nugget than a Darfaries to say no to a fight. They also sport the largest Darfaries Veins compared to Wozefaries & Sorefaries. Hence, the sheer additional volume allows them to finely sense Soul Energy disturbances around them, plus a rough sensation of humidity, wind, and barometric pressure—it’s like how they say, if a Darfaries tells you to buy an umbrella, you better buy one\!  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline  
  * They can naturally be born with a wide range of hair and eye colors.  
    * Females tend to have lighter hues while males tend to have darker ones.  
  * Both men and women are tall & muscular  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Lishies \+ Buhraies  
* **Habitat**  
  * Mostly Gandew Kingdom, but individuals are found around, as not every single Darfaries will agree with the Gandew Rules.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Omnivores  
* **Intelligence**  
  * 1.5x more than Humans when it comes to all faculties.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * When bred with other Darfaries, a Wozefaries might be born instead.  
    * When interbreeding with Humans, they are born Human-like, but with Soul Energy Capabilities of Darfaries.  
      * Sometimes with energy closer to humans. The presence or absence of the darfaries interface indicates the tendency of their genes and magical capabilities.  
    * When interbreeding with a Wozefaries, a Sorefaries is born  
    * \~15 Months gestation  
    * 1 to 3 babies  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Darfaries Interface.  
  * **Skills**  
    * The entire species shows the markings of controlled flight through these Soul Energy-specialized organs in the form of veins (they are actually nerves) throughout the upper body. However, due to their size, they can’t fly, nor dampen their fall, so it’s pretty useless.  
      * When dampening their fall, a black flame appears on their Darfaries' veins, while the veins themselves have a base white flame to directly convert Soul Energy.  
        * Due to their size, Darfaries cannot fly, but they can somewhat dampen their fall from approximately three-story buildings.  
      * \*The black flame itself will auto-change its strength if the person thinks of it like a jetpack or monopropellant of a spaceship. Their feet will be dangling. So they use their entire arms to control their motion.  
        ![][image1]  
    * They can also feel any remaining Soul Energy signature as a tingling sensation by smelling, licking, or within their sexual organs.  
    * They can also neutralize any kind of Soul Energy by infusing their saliva on the target.  
    * **Given that Darfaries sport the most prominent Darfaries veins, their sheer additional volume allows them to finely sense Soul Energy disturbances around them, plus a rough sensation of humidity, wind, and barometric pressure—it’s like how they say, if a Darfaries tells you to buy an umbrella, you better buy one\!**  
    * Darfaries Veins, as they are called, are not actually veins, but nerves. They have more sensitive skin than normal.  
      * “it’s red bumpiness was warmer than the rest of her hand and had a certain toughness to it, but as his finger pressed slightly on it, it gave way to its squishiness.”

# 

# **Wozefaries**

* **Website Description**  
  * **Wozefaries** are basically a smaller version of Darfaries, with intelligence and lifespan closer to a human's, with most of them having a petite, weaker build. Their protruding bottom teeth are also not as protruding as Darfaries', and they tend to be much more willing to strike up a conversation with a stranger at a bar. They seem more flexible and independent overall—although this is likely led more to environmental factors than genes, as all Wozefaries (and Sorefaries) born in Gandew are thrown out of the Goodbye Cliff and have to grow up in Flatland orphanages.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World History  
  * Several recessive genes mean that mixing blood with other species can result in some features showing while others might not.  
  * They can naturally be born with a wide range of hair and eye colors.  
    * Females tend to have lighter hues while males tend to have darker ones.  
  * Considered a lesser being by the Darfaries  
  * Both men & women are loli-looking.  
  * Their sweat has a mildly sweet odor and tastes sweet as well. It had a natural, somewhat girly accent on the sweet side of the spectrum.  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Lishies \+ Buhraies  
* **Habitat**  
  * Flatland City mainly, but also throughout the kingdom when the opportunity or curiosity arises.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Omnivores  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Similar to Humans, but slightly more emotional  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * Darfaries \+ Wozefaries \= Sorefaries  
    * Wozefaries \+ Wozefaries \= Wozefari, with a chance of Sorefaries.  
    * Wozefaries \+ Humans= Hybrid.   
      * When interbreeding with Humans, they are born Human-like, but with Soul Energy Capabilities closer to Wozefaries, including their Soul Energy sensibilities.  
      * The presence or absence of the darfaries interface indicates the tendency of their genes and magical capabilities.  
    * \~7 months gestation  
    * 1 to 2 babies  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Darfaries Interface.  
  * **Skills**  
    * When dampening their fall, a black flame appears on their Darfaries' veins (they are actually nerves), while the veins themselves have a base white flame to directly convert Soul Energy. They can glide longer than Darfaries  
      * Wozefaries can dampen their fall from up to ten-story buildings  
      *   
    * \*The black flame itself will auto-change its strength if the person thinks of it like a jetpack or monopropellant of a spaceship. Their feet will be dangling. So they use their entire arms to control their motion.

      ![][image1]

    * They can also feel any remaining Soul Energy signature as a tingling sensation by smelling, licking, or within their sexual organs.  
    * They can also neutralize any kind of Soul Energy by infusing their saliva on the target.  
    * Darfaries Veins, as they are called, are not actually veins, but nerves. They have more sensitive skin than normal.  
      * “Its red bumpiness was warmer than the rest of her hand and had a certain toughness to it, but as his finger pressed slightly on it, it gave way to its squishiness.”

# 

# **Sorefaries**

* **Website Description**  
  * **Sorefaries** are like humanoid pets, with intelligence closer to Bruntos or like a really smart Cruro. They can be helpful companions for adventurers as they can energetically fly about and sneakily scout ahead for dangers, or you can make use of their surplus of soul energy that can reach ancient species levels, but you need to be careful finding the right fit for you as they are finicky with their emotional behaviors—far, far worse than having a Sayna. Another fair comparison would be having a five-year-old kid as your companion, except they will never grow up and become more finicky, as they often grow senile in their thirties. Also, for some unknown reason, their sweat smells flowery, like roses and lilac. Maybe that has something to do with them being sterile.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline  
  * Several recessive genes mean that mixing blood with other species can result in some features showing while others might not.  
  * They can naturally be born with a wide range of hair and eye colors.  
    * Females tend to have lighter hues while males tend to have darker ones.  
  * Considered an abomination by Darfaries. Genetically speaking, they are the result of the different genes conflicting with each other  
  * Small Kid-like loli capable of flight.  
    * When flying, a red flame appears on their Darfaries tattoo.  
  * Their sweat produces an odor that is floristic  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Lishies \+ Buhraies  
* **Habitat**  
  * Flatland City and all over the kingdom due to adventurers.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Omnivores  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Reduced intelligence of a 5-year-old kid.   
  * Energetic by nature.  
  * Highly emotional.  
  * Great Companions, if they were trained in Flatland City  
    * Their keen sense of hearing make it great companions for adventurers and hunters  
    * Control some of their emotional outbursts, but not all.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * They are sterile due to a conflict between some recessive genes.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Darfaries Interface.  
  * **Skills**  
    * When flying, a black flame appears on their Darfaries' veins (they are actually nerves), while the veins themselves have a base white flame to convert Soul Energy directly.  
      * While Sorefaries can control their attitude at will.  
    * \*The black flame itself will auto-change its strength if the person thinks of it like a jetpack or monopropellant of a spaceship. Their feet will be dangling. So they use their entire arms to control their motion.

      ![][image1]

    * They can also feel any remaining Soul Energy signature as a tingling sensation by smelling, licking, or within their sexual organs.  
    * They can also neutralize any kind of Soul Energy by infusing their saliva on the target.  
    * Darfaries Veins, as they are called, are not actually veins, but nerves. They have more sensitive skin than normal.  
      * “Its red bumpiness was warmer than the rest of her hand and had a certain toughness to it, but as his finger pressed slightly on it, it gave way to its squishiness.”

# 

# **Humans (Naked Bruntos)**

* **Website Description**  
  * **Humans**, also known as Naked Bruntos, are, de facto, the largest race out there. From what scientists have pieced together from the remains of the Buhraies civilization, humans were either created or somehow manipulated from within the soul, as an evolution from Bruntos—a monkey species also foreign to the land. The genuine reasons for Bunhraies doing all of this are still debated today, ranging from playthings to blood cattle, from pure research to ground troops for attacking Lishies—or maybe all of the above, since Buhraies didn't share a collective mindset. Either way, humans grew uncontrollable despite their harsh situation. Eventually, they threw off the balance of life of the ancient species and nearly wiped everything off the map, almost itself in the process as well, given all the humans killing each other after Ganyrami fell. Luckily, the Prosperity Treaty put a stop to all the bloodshed—at least the worst of it.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline  
* **Scientific History**  
  * Homo Sapiens  
* **Habitat**  
  * Most places throughout the kingdom. It is by far the most numerous species.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Omnivores  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Same as the ones from this world.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * \~9 months gestation.  
    * 1 to 5 kids per birth.  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Darfaries Interface.  
  * **Skills**  
    * None

# 

# **Cruros**

* **Website Description**  
  * **Cruros** is a split from Crocus, an alligator-like reptile, but with more humanoid features and varying rates of intelligence. They cannot speak but can make grunts to socialize. Smarter ones can also learn to write and contribute to society. Nobody knows for sure how they suddenly started popping out from Cruroland, but the word in the street is that alcohol and a creepy scientist were involved.  
* **Isekai History**  
  * See World Timeline & Cruro.  
  * Crocus became their pet.  
  * They can make some weird throat sounds that other Cruros and Crocos seem to understand. Mostly to move others to attack or stop attacking  
  * They are not considered citizens of the Four Kingdoms by default until they become part of the Half-Cruro guild.  
* **Scientific History**  
  * [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Crurotarsi](https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Crurotarsi)  
* **Habitat**  
  * Most live by themselves in Cruro.  
  * A few go out exploring.  
* **Alimentation**  
  * Carnivores  
* **Intelligence**  
  * Most show the intelligence level of a dog and mostly act on instinct.  
  * The few intelligent ones can communicate through drawings, and some of them become tribe leaders.   
  * A few highly intelligent ones tend to go out to explore and mingle with Humans. They still can’t speak or listen, but can draw pictures to converse. These can understand the concepts of money, law, work, etc.  
  * Guardedness is a universal trait for them.  
* **Spoken Language**  
  * Vraki (Through Writing)  
  * Otherwise None. Some grunts can be understood among themselves as generic verbal cues (E.g., happy, sad).  
* **Stats**  
  * **Reproduction**  
    * Every year, a dozen or so eggs are laid by a female  
  * **Other**  
    * None  
* **Soul Energy Capabilities**  
  * **Interface**  
    * Cruros Interface.  
      * See Fauna \> Crocus. Inherited from them, but use the hair instead. It lifts up in the air like static and waves as the Soul Fire envelops it. It rushes through their body into the target, or through their body to physically tweak them.  
      * They still have the invisibility skill, but most can’t maintain it for more than a few minutes, compared to the efficient usage by Crocus.  
  * **Skills**  
    * They can detect Soul Energy by feeling an itchy back

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
